name: Dynamistic Quiver
description: With great power, comes great destruction.

name: Epic Dynamistic Quiver
description: With great power, comes great destruction.

name: Epic Purifying Quiver
description: While using this quiver, your ranged weapons will burn with enchanted flames.

name: Epic Quiver of Alacrity
description:
Said to allow the user to draw arrows or bolts at a very fast rate, this large,
thin quiver will hold 3 different types of arrow or bolt and can store each
type in a stack of up to 4500. Total capacity: 13500.
dropLocation: The Mark of Death, warded chest

name: Purifying Quiver
description: While using this quiver, your ranged weapons will burn with enchanted flames.

name: Quiver of Alacrity
description:
Said to allow the user to draw arrows or bolts at a very fast rate, this large,
thin quiver will hold 3 different types of arrow or bolt and can store each
type of up to 1500. Total capacity: 4500.

name: Quiver of Poison (Level 12)
description:
Ammunition stored in this quiver is magically coated with vile toxins, causing
your ranged attacks to deal debilitating effects of these magical poisons for
as long as this quiver is equipped. This large, thin quiver will hold 3 different
types of arrow or bolt and can store each type in a stack of up to 1000. Total
capacity: 3000.
dropLocation: A Cry for Help, and Foundation of Discord, end chest (heroic normal)

name: Quivering Quiver
description:
This quiver is completely organic, and is rough and slimy to the touch. It shivers
periodically, and when provoked it will sometimes disgorge arrows of a random
type. Try not to think about where they've been. The quiver will also hold
10 different types of arrow or bolt and can store each type in a stack of up
to 300. Total capacity: 3000.
